summary: Iteration 18: CStone equipment integration and backend module refactor. 19/19 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. New equipment_enhancer.py module fetches images from CStone GetGadgets API. MedPen Mk II and Hemozal display CStone images. ship_data_enhancer.py refactored to re-export from new modules (armor_enhancer.py, weapon_enhancer.py, equipment_enhancer.py).

issues: Console hydration warnings (span inside select/option) - cosmetic only, functionality unaffected (same as previous iterations)

critical_code_review_comments: equipment_enhancer.py correctly fetches from CStone GetGadgets API and maps equipment names to CStone gadget names
ship_data_enhancer.py cleanly re-exports from armor_enhancer.py, weapon_enhancer.py, equipment_enhancer.py for backward compatibility
gear.py routes correctly import from new modules and enrich equipment with CStone images
EquipmentCard component properly displays image thumbnails, stats, and variant selectors with (Base) label
GearDetailModal handles equipment items correctly showing stats from item.stats object
seed_data_creation: No new seed data - CStone API provides equipment images dynamically
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 added CStone image integration for Equipment tab (medical items only - MedPen Mk II, Hemozal have images). Backend was refactored from 805-line ship_data_enhancer.py into 4 focused modules: armor_enhancer.py, weapon_enhancer.py, equipment_enhancer.py (new), and ship_data_enhancer.py (now only handles ship/vehicle images). All 3 Gear tabs working correctly with CStone images, variant selectors with (Base) label, and modal stats. Test user: e1agent/test123.

feature_verification_summary.armor_regression: PASS - 28 armor sets with CStone images, variant data, modal stats
feature_verification_summary.tab_switching: PASS - All 3 tabs switch correctly with filter reset
feature_verification_summary.backend_refactor: PASS - Server starts correctly with new module imports
